channel.title: GraphiQuestor – Macro Intelligence Feed
channel.description: Latest macro signals, liquidity regimes, sovereign stress markers, and geo-economic intelligence from GraphiQuestor observatory.

item.title: The Debt/Gold Ratio: Why It Matters for Monetary Sovereignty in 2026
item.description: An institutional-grade analysis of sovereign debt burdens relative to gold reserves, featuring our proprietary Gold Ratio Ribbon.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: BRICS+ De-Dollarization: Mapping the Structural Shift in Global Reserves
item.description: Tracking the secular decline of USD reserve share and the rise of mBridge and bilateral settlement systems.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: India Macro Pulse: A Deep Dive into MoSPI Industrial and Labor Data
item.description: Understanding India’s real economy through PLFS, ASI, and CPI granularity.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: Shanghai Divergence: When Monetary Policy Conflicts with Fiscal Mandates
item.description: Explaining our proprietary indicator that tracks policy tension between the PBOC and Beijing fiscal authorities.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: India Energy Security: A State-wise Vulnerability Mapping
item.description: Analyzing energy dependency ratios across Indian states using MoSPI Energy Statistics.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: The Capital Allocator’s Guide to Global Net Liquidity
item.description: How to track the "Oxygen" of the financial markets using Fed, TGA, and RRP signals.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: ASI Manufacturing Intelligence: Beyond Headline IIP Numbers
item.description: Leveraging the Annual Survey of Industries for institutional EM positioning.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: G20 Macro Surveillance: Tracking Sovereign Stress in a Fragmenting World
item.description: How unified macro surveillance helps identify systemic risks across the G20 nations.
item.author: research@graphiquestor.com (GraphiQuestor Research)

item.title: India Macro Intelligence Hub — Live Dashboard
item.description: Institutional-grade macro telemetry for India: credit cycle, fiscal stress, sovereign debt maturity wall, RBI liquidity dynamics, and de-dollarisation strategy.

item.title: China Macro Intelligence Hub — Live Dashboard
item.description: High-frequency activity monitor tracking China's credit impulse, deflation risk, industrial velocity, PBoC monetary stance, FX reserves, and de-dollarization momentum.

item.title: Macro Concepts Glossary — Institutional Definitions
item.description: Institutional definitions for macro liquidity, sovereign debt risk, and geo-economic terminology — TGA, RRP, Net Liquidity Z-Score, Term Premium, Stealth QE, and more.
